sections.name: Archetype Use
sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.

feat.name: Guardian's Deflection
feat.text: You use your weapon to deflect the attack against your ally, granting a +2 circumstance bonus to their AC against the triggering attack. This turns the triggering critical hit into a hit, or the triggering hit into a miss. You gain panache until the end of your next turn.

traits.name: Swashbuckler
traits.text: This trait indicates abilities from the swashbuckler class.

archetype.name: Ulfen Guard
archetype.note: This archetype offers Guardian's Deflection at a different level than displayed here.

feat.trigger: An ally within your melee reach is hit by an attack, you can see the attacker, and a +2 circumstance bonus to AC would turn the critical hit into a hit or the hit into a miss.
feat.requirement: You are wielding a single one-handed melee weapon and have your other hand or hands free.
